ConnectionStrings._comment: One database for the whole activities module. Each kind isolates itself with a Postgres schema owned internally by Add{Kind}ActivityModule. Override via ConnectionStrings__Activities when running under compose.databases.shared.yaml.

GeoRegionSeeder._comment: Loads region polygons into activities.geo_regions at host startup. The seeder soft-fails when a file is missing; commit larger sets (REGINE, Mareano) to deploy bundle and override the FilePath via env. See apps/api/seed/README.md.
